title: selinum orientale
intro: Selinum orientale, also known as King's Crown or Lovage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to southern Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selinum orientale include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Selinum orientale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in cooking, particularly in soups and stews, to add flavor and nutritional value.
